name: Performance 5-Inch Running Shorts
description: Lightweight running shorts with a built-in compression liner and moisture-wicking fabric. Features a hidden zip pocket for keys and a phone pocket that doesn't bounce. Built for speed work, long runs, and race day.
specs: 86% recycled polyester 14% spandex, Moisture-wicking and quick-drying, Built-in compression brief liner, 5-inch inseam, Hidden back zip pocket (fits phone up to 6.7 inches), Reflective logo for low-light visibility, Elastic waistband with internal drawcord, Machine wash cold, Tumble dry low, Sizes S through XL
warranty: 30-day return policy. Returns must be unworn with tags attached for hygiene reasons.
shipping: Free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Standard delivery 3-5 business days. Express 1-2 day shipping available for $9.99.
